title: Fastenal 2025 Annual Report and Form 10-K
note: Primary source for Fastenal's business model, locations, managed inventory programs, vending/bin technologies, sales mix, and profitability.

title: Fastenal Investor Relations
note: Investor-relations hub for company filings, releases, and operating updates.

title: FAST Solutions
note: Product page for Fastenal's managed inventory, vending, bin, and supply-chain service offerings.

title: Fastenal Market Cap and Net Worth
note: Market-data source for Fastenal's late-May 2026 market capitalization.

title: Fastenal Statistics and Valuation
note: Market-data source for Fastenal valuation metrics including trailing P/E.

title: Global Village Construction Set
note: Open-source industrial-machine project used as an enabling reference for distributed fabrication and local production concepts.

title: Open Know-How
note: Open data model for sharing hardware designs and documentation, relevant to open part catalogs and distributed manufacturing coordination.

title: PartKeepr Open Source Inventory Management
note: Open-source inventory management project relevant to supplier-neutral parts tracking, with the caveat that the repository has been archived.

title: Part-DB Server
note: Open-source parts inventory project used as a plausible software primitive for buyer-controlled inventory and replenishment workflows.
